steps.t: The woman Aithil, south-east of the Pelargir Armoury, is convinced that you <rgb=#00FF00>agree</rgb> with the Heirs of Castamir. You shoul…
Sirgon's Manor is located to the north of the Pelargir Armoury, in King's Gondor.
Legolas and Gimli have come to Sirgon's Manor to await your tidings.
Faltharan is inside his father's manor.
Faltharan told you that Amon Anglebed has been kept burning, and may be the beacon about which the skulking woman spoke.
A man stands by the beacon. Perhaps he is the contact about whom you were told, and if you <rgb=#00FF00>agree</rgb> with him he will revea…
Maethon stands by the burning beacon of Amon Anglebed, in King's Gondor.
